name: research-workflow
description: Self-contained base research workflow: loads the durable research artifacts (commonly abstract / proposal / experiments / results) from research/ at session start, re-injects research standing rules every turn, gates session exit on a distillation decision, ships /research-init, and the problem-statement / literature-scan / gap-analysis / generate-research-proposal / experiment-design / preregistration / results-memo / negative-results / decision-memo skills.
